name: Impor Arsip allows uploading excel files
description: Verifies that the /arsip/impor page loads correctly and handles file uploads. Since testing actual file uploads requires specific test data, we verify the UI presence and basic interactions.

planSteps.description: Navigate to /login and login with admin@siwono.local and password123
Assert that Dashboard or 'Selamat Datang' text is visible
Assert that the page displays a title like 'Impor Data Arsip' or a file upload input is visible
